positive: A stylized, whimsical illustration of a group of diverse forest animals—a friendly fox, an inquisitive deer, and a slumbering badger—interacting in a magical, enchanted forest clearing. The style should be highly detailed, reminiscent of modern children's book art, using bold linework and vibrant, jewel-toned colors. The composition should be balanced and circular, placing the animals centrally. Emphasize strong silhouettes and clean edges suitable for printing. Lighting should be dappled and magical, suggesting filtered sunlight through an overhead canopy. Color palette should be nature-inspired: deep emerald, sapphire blue, moss green, and warm golds. Focus on positive emotions and harmony. Perfect symmetry, high contrast, vector art aesthetics, clean lines, highly detailed for apparel print, centered, whimsical fantasy.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, poorly drawn, sketch, realistic photo, grayscale, mutated, disfigured
